purpose: Regression baseline for the uncalibrated maintenance scanner. Raw audit output remains visible; the gate fails only when current critical/high debt exceeds this reviewed baseline.
calibrationNotes: type-safety, dead-code, and test-gap are immediate blocker lanes and currently have zero critical/high findings under src.
complexity, file-bloat, and near-duplicate are audit lanes until each is split into deliberate remediation waves.
Stale-todo now scans comment text only; test fixture values such as temp no longer count as TODO-like comments, and the high lane is zero under src.
Import-health now keeps public barrel breadth visible as warnings instead of high findings; circular imports remain the high-risk import-health lane.
Near-duplicate now reports duplicate clusters instead of every overlapping five-line window; remaining high findings are cluster-level remediation targets.
CriticalSlotsTab.slotBuilders was refactored into local slot-layout helpers, removing one critical code-smell finding and one critical complexity finding.
VersionDiffView was split into a stateful container and diff-content renderer, removing one critical code-smell finding and one critical complexity finding without adding high file-bloat.
QueryBuilder was split into helper functions and controls, removing its critical complexity finding without adding audit-query file-bloat.
PermissionRepository.test moved the SQLite mock dispatch into named helpers, removing its clustered critical code-smell and complexity findings while preserving the 41-test suite.
ControlledInput moved validation class, message, icon, and optional-callback branches into helpers, removing its critical/high complexity finding while preserving the 28-test suite.

HexCell moved overlay precedence into pure helpers, removing one critical code-smell finding while preserving focused HexMapDisplay tests; HexCell remains a critical complexity and file-bloat remediation target.

skillCatalog.test moved category expectations into shared test constants and flattened branch-heavy category checks, removing three critical code-smell findings and one high complexity finding while preserving the 39-test suite.
terrainGenerator.test flattened broad grouping wrappers, removing four critical test-only complexity findings while preserving the 37-test suite.
VaultExportImportFlow.test flattened its broad outer grouping wrapper, removing one critical test-only complexity finding while preserving the 27-test suite.
UnitEquipmentValidation.test flattened its broad outer grouping wrapper, removing one critical test-only complexity finding while preserving the 8-test integration suite.

P2P intent/envelope cleanup flattened a broad intent test wrapper and split envelope deserialization branches into named helpers, removing one critical and one high complexity finding while preserving the focused intent and channel suites.

swarmAggregation.snapshot.test and aiObjectiveAwarenessIntegration.test moved long test helper parameters into typed fixture objects, removing three high code-smell findings while preserving their focused suites.
commandFixtures moved sample contract construction to a typed fixture object, removing one high code-smell finding while preserving the downstream command-panel suites.
svgRecordSheetRenderer equipment.test flattened broad rendering wrappers, removing one critical and one high test-only complexity finding while preserving the 30-test equipment rendering suite.

KeyMomentDetector, NoProgressDetector, and StateCycleDetector moved damage event helpers to typed fixture objects, removing three high test-only code-smell findings while preserving the 144-test detector slice.

combatValidationCatalog.contract.test moved catalog and triad evidence assertions into named helpers, removing three critical code-smell findings and three critical complexity findings while preserving the 17-test catalog contract suite.

InteractiveSession movement and attack-projection scenario tests flattened broad describe wrappers, removing two critical test-only complexity findings while preserving the 118-test engine scenario slice.
useKeyboardNavigation moved navigation index math into pure helpers, removing two critical complexity findings and two high code-smell findings while preserving the 23-test hook suite.

VaultFolderRepository.test moved SQL statement mocking into named statement configurers, removing two critical test-only complexity findings while preserving the 63-test vault folder repository suite.

simulationRunner.test and simulation-combat-integration.test flattened broad outer describe wrappers, removing two critical test-only complexity findings while preserving the 114-test simulation slice.
atlasHydration.test flattened its broad Atlas hydration wrapper, removing one critical test-only complexity finding while preserving the 56-test hydration suite.
combatActionCatalog.contract.test flattened its broad combat action support wrapper, removing one critical test-only complexity finding while preserving the 18-test contract suite.
combatValidationRequirementCatalog.contract.test flattened its broad requirement crosswalk wrapper, removing one critical test-only complexity finding while preserving the 37-test contract suite.
combatPilotModifierApplicationCatalog.contract.test flattened its broad resolver application wrapper, removing one critical test-only complexity finding while preserving the 41-test contract suite.
criticalHitEvents.test flattened broad critical-hit event chain wrappers, removing one critical test-only complexity finding while preserving the 59-test event suite.
physicalAttackRunner.behavior.test flattened its broad physical attack behavior wrapper, removing one critical test-only complexity finding while preserving the 127-test behavior suite.
weaponAttackEvents.test flattened its broad event wrapper and large AttackResolved wrapper, removing two critical test-only complexity findings while preserving the 82-test weapon attack event suite.

combatPilotModifierApplicationCatalog.contract.test moved integrated-resolver SPA exception checks and source-ref aggregation into data-driven helpers, removing four critical test-only complexity findings while preserving the 41-test contract suite.
battlemechCombatCatalog.contract.test flattened broad catalog validation and feature-gap wrappers, removing two critical test-only complexity findings while preserving the 47-test catalog suite.

Final runner test complexity cleanup moved BattleMech catalog source-ref checks into helpers and flattened remaining broad contract/event/indirect-fire wrappers, reducing the runner test complexity slice to zero critical/high findings.
reachable.test flattened its broad deriveReachableHexes wrapper, removing one critical test-only complexity finding while preserving the 103-test movement reachability suite.
tactical-map.movement-scenarios.test flattened its broad tactical map movement scenarios wrapper, removing one high test-only complexity finding while preserving the 22-test scenario suite.

HandlerIntegration.test replaced its broad unit-type fixture switch with an explicit fixture lookup table, removing one high test-only design-violation finding while preserving the 29-test handler integration suite.

useCommandPreview.test moved shared command handles to file scope and flattened the broad buildCommandPreview wrapper, removing one high test-only complexity finding while preserving the 13-test command preview suite.

nameMappings.test flattened its broad name-mappings validation wrapper while preserving the shared beforeAll catalog setup, removing one high test-only complexity finding while preserving the 7-test mapping validation suite.

UnitSerializer.test moved its mock unit helper to file scope and flattened the broad UnitSerializer wrapper while preserving serializer API groupings, removing one high test-only complexity finding while preserving the 26-test serializer suite.

EquipmentLookupService.test flattened its broad outer service wrapper while preserving lookup/filtering/data-integrity groupings, removing one high test-only complexity finding while preserving the 37-test equipment lookup suite and clearing src/__tests__ complexity.

MmDataAssetService.test flattened its broad asset service wrapper while preserving SVG loading/path/configuration groups and shared mock setup, removing one high test-only complexity finding while preserving the 67-test asset service suite.
EncounterService.test extracted mocked repository create/update behavior into named helpers, removing two high test-only complexity findings while preserving the 49-test encounter service suite.
Vehicle critical hit resolution now uses a data table for the generic 2d6 table, removing one critical code-smell finding while preserving the 38-test vehicle critical hit suite.

Slot operations now use fixed-slot collector and unhittable-fill helpers, clearing src/utils/construction/slotOperations critical/high scanner findings while preserving the 12-test slot operation suite.

Capital transport bay parsing now uses a shared rule-driven parser with per-handler rule tables, removing duplicated critical transporter parsing branches while preserving 141 DropShip, JumpShip, WarShip, and SpaceStation handler tests.

GameOutcomeCalculator now resolves outcome precedence through small decision helpers, removing one critical calculateGameOutcome nesting finding while preserving the focused 21-test outcome calculator suite.

ParityValidationHelpers now routes critical slot mismatch categorization through focused issue builders, removing one critical compareCriticalSlots nesting finding while preserving and extending the focused 17-test helper suite.

CanonicalUnitService now maps tech base, tonnage, and era through pure table-driven helpers, removing one critical mapRawToIndexEntry nesting finding while preserving and extending the focused 26-test service suite.

UnitLoaderService component mappers now route engine types through a normalized lookup, assign armor by location key, and route armor allocation entries through focused value/rear-armor helpers, removing the critical mapArmorAllocation nesting finding plus high mapEngineType complexity and location-switch findings while preserving and extending the focused 28-test mapper suite.

UnitLoaderService armor tonnage now uses explicit counted-field, points-per-ton, and half-ton rounding helpers, removing one high calculateArmorTonnage nesting finding while preserving and extending the focused service armor calculation tests.

UnitLoaderService equipment resolution now routes direct variant lookup, mixed-tech critical-slot hints, unit-preferred variants, and registry aliases through focused helpers, removing one high resolveEquipmentId complexity finding while preserving and extending the focused 18-test resolution suite.

UnitLoaderService state mapping now composes pure identity, configuration, component, heat sink, armor, and equipment derivation helpers, removing one high mapToUnitState complexity finding while preserving the focused 38-test loader suite.

EventLogDisplay now keeps event formatting in a formatter module with table-driven icon and priority maps, removing formatEvent, getEventIcon, getEventPriority, and helper file-bloat findings while preserving focused event-log suites.

Combat event factories now split attack, damage, and indirect-fire factories across focused modules with object-input-compatible factory signatures and updated source refs, removing eleven high code-smell findings and one high file-bloat finding while preserving factory, damage, indirect-fire, and catalog contract tests.

Status-check event factories now split PSR, unit-state, heat, ammo, and AMS factories across focused modules behind the existing statusChecks barrel with object-input-compatible factory signatures and updated BattleMech source refs, removing eight high code-smell findings while preserving PSR, heat, utility action, and combat catalog tests.

Small game event factories now share a gameplay event context helper and accept object-input-compatible factory signatures across lifecycle, initiative, morale, and ground-object events while preserving positional compatibility, removing six high code-smell findings while preserving focused event, morale, ground-object, and combat catalog tests.

Movement, status, physical, and vehicle event factories now split declaration, invalidation, heat, lifecycle, critical, physical, and vehicle payload construction into focused modules with object-input-compatible factory signatures and updated combat source refs, clearing the gameEvents critical/high slice while preserving focused event and combat catalog tests.

Objective lifecycle event factories now accept object-input-compatible signatures while preserving positional compatibility and updated combat source refs, clearing the objectives code-smell slice while preserving focused objective and combat catalog tests.

Vehicle armor max helpers now accept a named armor profile object while preserving positional compatibility, clearing the customizer vehicle code-smell slice while preserving focused vehicle armor diagram tests.

Battle armor trooper mass calculation now accepts a named mass input object while preserving positional compatibility, clearing the battlearmor construction code-smell slice while preserving focused construction and BV tests.
Called-shot modifier calculation now accepts a named input object while preserving positional compatibility, removing one high code-smell finding while preserving focused to-hit tests.
Replay event overlay payload summaries now format values through a flat helper, clearing the audit replay code-smell slice while preserving focused replay marker and loader tests.

CreateCampaignPage moved campaign submission side effects into a focused submit helper module and kept the page as wizard orchestration, clearing the campaign creation code-smell slice while preserving the preset wiring test.

Tactical map projection explanations now assemble movement, stand-up, combat, weapon impact, cover, C3, and LOS-blocker text through focused helpers, removing the projection explanation critical code-smell finding while preserving the shared projection explanation tests.

Damage resolution finalization now lives in a focused finalize module so resolve.ts remains an entrypoint, clearing the damage code-smell slice without creating a high file-bloat finding while preserving 92 focused damage and critical-hit tests.

Damage location application now moves armor/structure bookkeeping into a focused helper module so location.ts remains the transfer-facing entrypoint, removing the applyDamageToLocation high complexity finding without introducing high file-bloat while preserving 92 focused damage and critical-hit tests.

CriticalHitResolution now splits slot effect classification, predicate helpers, resolver state, and actuator lookup tables, clearing eleven critical/high findings while preserving 216 focused critical-hit and damage lifecycle tests.

Game-state damage replay now routes critical-hit component, equipment, electronic-warfare, and vehicle envelope updates through focused helpers, clearing five critical/high findings while preserving 222 focused critical-hit and replay tests.

Game-state combatState initialization now routes per-unit combat envelope construction through a focused helper module, removing one critical complexity finding while preserving 88 focused initialization and game-state tests.
Minefield replay now routes MinefieldChanged operations through table-driven operation handlers, removing one high complexity finding while preserving 80 focused game-state and combat catalog tests.

Physical attack resolution replay now lives in a focused helper module, removing one high complexity finding and demoting extendedCombat from critical to high file-bloat while preserving 590 focused physical/game-state tests.

Game-state event dispatch now lives in a focused registry module, removing the applyEvent critical complexity finding, the gameStateReducer switch design finding, and the gameStateReducer high file-bloat finding while preserving 590 focused reducer/physical tests and 36 catalog-contract tests.

Extended combat replay now routes piloting, status, and unit-exit reducers through focused modules plus a shared unit patch helper, removing one high file-bloat finding and one high near-duplicate cluster while preserving 131 focused replay/catalog tests.
Runtime movement-state tests now split mount/altitude and conversion replay coverage through shared fixtures, removing one critical test file-bloat finding while preserving 9 focused tests.

Combat-state initialization tests now split shared fixtures from mech/vehicle, aero/proto, and infantry/battle-armor behavior suites, removing one high test file-bloat finding while preserving 16 focused tests and clearing the gameState critical/high slice.

Post-combat runner phases now keep PSR and heat implementations behind focused accounting, lifecycle, and event helper modules, removing two critical code-smell findings, two critical complexity findings, and one high file-bloat finding while preserving PSR/heat behavior and catalog contract tests.
Movement terrain skid modifier logic now uses a table-driven threshold lookup, removing one critical code-smell finding while preserving movement terrain PSR behavior and catalog contracts.

Engine phase and AI dispatch now use early-return phase branches and focused AI phase helpers, removing three critical code-smell findings while preserving engine phase-loop, movement validation, attack projection, physical attack, match-log, and swarm-fire tests; InteractiveSession.ai now carries one additional file-bloat warning.

UnitHydration active-probe classification now uses ordered fallback predicates, removing one critical code-smell finding while preserving active-probe hydration, critical replay, and catalog contract tests; active-probe source references were repinned.

SPA designation handoff now collects typed pilot designations through guard-return helpers, removing one critical populateAttackerDesignations code-smell finding while preserving focused SPA and pilot-modifier catalog tests; attacker SPA aggregation source references were repinned.

Award store specific-event matching now uses a focused companion helper module with flat predicates, removing two critical useAwardStore code-smell findings while preserving the award store suite and avoiding a new max-lines warning; the test run still emits existing React act warnings around getPilotStats.

Attack resolution now routes hit damage, critical, PSR, pilot, and destruction event emission through focused helpers, removing one critical resolveAttack code-smell finding and one critical complexity finding while preserving 72 focused attack/damage/ammo/arc/vehicle tests.

Heat phase resolution now routes per-unit source accounting, dissipation, startup/shutdown, ammo cookoff, pilot heat damage, and MaxTech heat critical handling through focused helpers with named heat cascade event factory inputs, removing one critical resolveHeatPhase code-smell finding, one critical complexity finding, and two high event-factory parameter findings while preserving 74 focused heat tests.

Pending PSR resolution now lives in a focused gameSessionPSRResolution module re-exported by gameSessionPSR, removing the resolvePendingPSRs critical complexity finding while preserving 179 focused PSR tests and avoiding a file-bloat regression.

PSR reason category classification now uses an exhaustive typed lookup table instead of a switch, removing the getPSRReasonCategory critical complexity finding and one high design finding while preserving 131 focused PSR taxonomy/resolution tests.

PSR modifier resolution now lives in a focused modifierResolution module with compact resolver adapters, removing the calculatePSRModifiers critical complexity finding, the terrain classification switch design finding, and three high parameter-count findings while preserving 155 focused PSR tests and 73 catalog-contract tests.

To-hit calculation now normalizes positional and named inputs through compact adapters and rule-family helper collectors, removing the calculateToHit critical complexity finding plus calculateToHit/calculateToHitWithC3 high parameter-count findings while preserving 721 focused to-hit/C3/SPA/quirk tests, 92 catalog-contract tests, and full combat validation.

Runner phase event envelope creation now accepts named input behind a positional-compatible adapter, removing the createGameEvent high parameter-count finding while preserving 12 focused event-envelope and replay-source tests.

Ammo explosion critical handling now iterates criticalEvents through an empty-array default instead of a nested guard, removing one high code-smell finding while preserving focused critical-hit, heat, and catalog tests plus combat validation.

Physical attack damage application now lives in a focused companion module with helper seams for critical context, critical state effects, and physical damage/destroyed event emission, removing the applyPhysicalDamage high complexity finding while preserving focused physical-combat and catalog contract tests.

Weapon attack critical event emission now lives in a focused helper module re-exported through weaponAttackHelpers, removing the emitCritEvents high complexity finding while preserving critical-hit event contract tests.

Movement terrain PSR collection now routes water, terrain, swamp, building, and skidding checks through focused collector helpers, removing the terrainPSRsForStep high complexity finding while preserving movement terrain behavior and catalog tests.

Weapon hit resolution now routes zero-projectile, partial-cover, designator marker, plasma, Edge, damage adjustment, manifest, and equipment-critical state branches through focused helpers, removing the resolveWeaponHit critical/high complexity finding while preserving focused weapon-hit and catalog tests.

Movement phase execution now keeps runMovementPhase as a compact orchestrator and routes per-unit movement decisions plus committed movement side effects through focused helpers, removing the runMovementPhase high complexity and movement.ts high file-bloat findings while preserving focused movement and catalog tests.

Weapon firing mode projectile resolution now lives in focused classifier and projectile helper modules while weaponAttackFiringModes remains the public import surface, removing its high file-bloat finding while preserving focused firing-mode, weapon-event, and catalog tests.

Weapon attack partial-cover tests now keep local hit-resolution fixture construction in a sibling fixture module, removing the partial-cover test high file-bloat finding while preserving the 12-test partial-cover suite.

Heat-induced ammo explosion cascade damage now routes damage-applied, location-destroyed, and transfer-damage event emission through a named heat-event append helper, removing two runner-phase high near-duplicate findings while preserving focused heat tests.

Movement control PSR now uses a normalized BattleMech-like unit-type set and a named PSR event append helper, removing two runner-phase high near-duplicate findings while preserving focused movement tests.

Runner phase UnitDestroyed event emission now uses a named append helper for heat, movement, physical, post-combat PSR, and weapon-hit destruction paths, removing one runner-phase high near-duplicate cluster while preserving focused destruction-event tests.

Runner phase PSRTriggered event emission now uses a named append helper for heat, movement-enhancement, physical-critical, and weapon leg-damage PSR paths, removing one runner-phase high near-duplicate cluster while preserving focused PSR event tests.

Runner phase AttackResolved event emission now uses a named append helper across weapon miss, hit, early-return, plasma, and designator paths, removing one runner-phase high near-duplicate cluster while preserving focused weapon tests.
Weapon attack critical ammo explosion options now use named readonly option/result interfaces, removing the final runner-phase high near-duplicate cluster while preserving focused weapon tests.

Movement minefield damage/event helpers now split BattleMech mine damage side effects from represented minefield selection and source refs are repinned, preserving focused movement and terrain catalog tests without adding high file-bloat.
Physical attack arm-weapon fired selection now lives behind a flat helper, removing the runPhysicalAttackPhase critical nesting finding while preserving 626 focused physical attack tests.

Weapon attack indirect-fire side events and miss handling now live in focused helper modules, demoting runAttackPhase nesting from critical to high, reducing runAttackPhase complexity, and preserving focused weapon event, indirect-fire, damage lifecycle, and combat event catalog tests.

gameSessionPhysical physical attack restriction dispatch now uses a typed resolver table, removing the declarePhysicalAttack critical nesting finding while preserving 158 focused physical declaration/resolution tests.

gameSessionPhysical physical attack damage and PSR event emission now live in focused helper modules, removing the resolveAllPhysicalAttacks critical nesting finding while preserving 158 focused physical declaration/resolution tests.

Equipment BV normalization now routes ordered catalog/name/alias/pattern candidates through focused lookup helpers, removing the normalizeEquipmentId critical complexity finding while preserving 83 focused equipment BV normalization/resolver tests and leaving the equipmentBV scanner slice at zero critical/high findings.

Record-sheet fixed slot content now uses fixed lookup tables and a compact center-torso band resolver, removing the getFixedSlotContent critical complexity finding while preserving 53 focused record-sheet critical-slot rendering tests and leaving the record-sheet slice with no critical findings.

LocationMappings parseLocation now uses ordered rear/fuzzy location rules, removing one critical complexity finding while preserving 63 focused conversion location tests and clearing conversion-service complexity findings.

Random force generation now delegates budget bounds, affordable selection, chassis-cap eviction, and force assembly to focused helpers, removing the generateRandomForceOnce critical complexity finding while preserving 25 focused random-force and swarm unit-count tests.
HexCell terrain badge labels now use a table-driven badge lookup, removing one high complexity and one high switch-design finding while preserving the 8-test terrain label suite.

EquipmentPlacement location restrictions now use an exhaustive predicate table, removing one high complexity and one high switch-design finding while preserving and extending the 16-test location restriction suite.

VariableEquipment formula validation now uses formula-family validators, removing one high complexity and one high switch-design finding while preserving registry validation and adding a focused 3-test validator suite.

Pilot designation helpers now use table-driven legacy designation and effect-parameter resolvers, removing one high SPADesignation complexity finding and one high PilotInterfaces switch-design finding while preserving and extending the focused 24-test pilot type suite.

Force type helper metadata now uses slot-count and display-name lookup tables, removing two high ForceInterfaces switch-design findings while preserving and adding a focused 10-test force helper suite.

Combat location helpers now use transfer and rear-front lookup tables, removing one high CombatLocationHelpers switch-design finding while preserving and adding a focused 25-test combat location helper suite.
UnitLocation now uses a typed unit-location lookup table, removing one high switch-design finding while preserving and adding a focused 19-test construction location helper suite.

Construction configuration helpers now reduce the registry public-method surface and share location/slot metadata, clearing the construction-type critical/high scanner slice while preserving 160 focused construction tests.

Repair assessment now accepts named damage-assessment input and the large repair test suite is split into focused files, clearing the repair-type critical/high scanner slice while preserving focused repair tests.
Unit mounted-equipment interfaces now share a type-only identity base, clearing the unit-type near-duplicate scanner slice while preserving typecheck coverage.

HexCell invalid badges now use resolver and lookup tables for movement/combat invalid labels, removing one high complexity finding and two high switch-design findings while preserving fallback labels.
Scanner near-duplicate calibration now ignores block-comment delimiters and public index.ts barrels, reducing false-positive duplicate clusters while leaving import-health barrel warnings visible.

Construction, vehicle customizer, critical-slots, dialog, and armor-variant slices now report 0 critical/high findings after focused helper extraction, duplicate consolidation, and verified typecheck/test passes.
Battle armor, infantry, ProtoMech, and vehicle BV test suites were split into focused files, clearing construction test file-bloat and preserving focused BV validation.

Unit handler maintenance removed handler design-violation findings with shared parsing helpers while preserving 892 focused handler tests; remaining handler findings are file-bloat and near-duplicate remediation queues.

HexMapDisplay, movement, and physical-attack utility waves removed selected complexity/design findings while preserving focused tactical, movement, and physical attack tests; larger rules files remain active remediation queues.

The regression baseline was reduced to 932 critical/high findings after scanner duplicate calibration and the construction, vehicle, critical-slots, dialog, armor-variant, unit-handler, HexMapDisplay, movement, and physical-attack maintenance waves.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1011 critical/high findings after construction, repair, unit mounted-equipment, and HexCell invalid-badge cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1019 critical/high findings after UnitLocation helper cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1020 critical/high findings after combat location helper cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1021 critical/high findings after force type helper cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1023 critical/high findings after pilot designation resolver cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1025 critical/high findings after VariableEquipment formula validator cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1027 critical/high findings after EquipmentPlacement restriction predicate cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1029 critical/high findings after HexCell terrain badge lookup cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1031 critical/high findings after random force generation helper extraction.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1032 critical/high findings after LocationMappings parseLocation rule cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1033 critical/high findings after record-sheet fixed-slot lookup cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1034 critical/high findings after equipmentBV normalization cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1035 critical/high findings after gameSessionPhysical physical attack damage/PSR helper extraction.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1036 critical/high findings after gameSessionPhysical physical attack restriction-dispatch cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1037 critical/high findings after physical attack selector cleanup and weapon attack indirect/miss helper extraction.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1038 critical/high findings after runner AttackResolved helper cleanup and critical ammo explosion option-contract cleanup.
The regression baseline was reduced to 1040 critical/high findings after runner PSRTriggered event helper cleanup.
